Name: Biggest Fan
Desc: An Angels of Delusion superfan for life!

1.Name: I Stan My Angels
1.Desc:
<color=#FFFFFF>Active Skill</color>
Upon activating this skill, Biggest Fan starts cheering, continuously restoring HP to the currently controlled character based on Biggest Fan's Max HP.

1.Name: Fandom Power Unleashed
1.Desc:
<color=#FFFFFF>Additional Ability</color>
When there's at least 2 <color=#FFFFFF>Angels of Delusion</color> characters in your squad: When Biggest Fan uses its <color=#FFFFFF>Active Skill</color>, all Agents in the squad gain 50 ATK for 30s.
The Attribute Anomaly Buildup dealt by <color=#FFFFFF>Bangboo Chain Attack</color> is increased by 15%.

2.Name: Fandom Power Unleashed
2.Desc:
<color=#FFFFFF>Additional Ability</color>
When there's at least 2 <color=#FFFFFF>Angels of Delusion</color> characters in your squad: When Biggest Fan uses its <color=#FFFFFF>Active Skill</color>, all Agents in the squad gain 62 ATK for 30s.
The Attribute Anomaly Buildup dealt by <color=#FFFFFF>Bangboo Chain Attack</color> is increased by 18.8%.

3.Name: Fandom Power Unleashed
3.Desc:
<color=#FFFFFF>Additional Ability</color>
When there's at least 1 <color=#FFFFFF>Angels of Delusion</color> characters in your squad: When Biggest Fan uses its <color=#FFFFFF>Active Skill</color>, all Agents in the squad gain 75 ATK for 30s.
The Attribute Anomaly Buildup dealt by <color=#FFFFFF>Bangboo Chain Attack</color> is increased by 22.5%.

4.Name: Fandom Power Unleashed
4.Desc:

5.Name: Fandom Power Unleashed
5.Desc:

The Attribute Anomaly Buildup dealt by <color=#FFFFFF>Bangboo Chain Attack</color> is increased by 30%.
